commands.review_summary:
The PR adds iOS Liquid Glass styling, an Open Talk Mode App Intent/Action Button shortcut, and Dynamic Island/lock-screen Live Activity status updates.

PR surface: Other +533. Total +533 across 13 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for source-level review findings: the stale HUD timer and metadata-refresh identity paths are traceable in the PR head. No live iOS device reproduction was run in this read-only cleanup review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The remaining action is iOS owner/product review plus contributor-owned current-head proof and rebase, not a safe autonomous cleanup close or repair lane.

target.title: feat(ios): Liquid Glass UI, Action Button & Dynamic Island
target.body:
## Summary

- Problem: N/A — this PR adds iOS 26 user-facing capabilities rather than fixing a regression.
- Why it matters: OpenClaw’s iOS app gains modern platform-native UX for glass styling, quick voice entry via Action Button/App Intent, and Dynamic Island / lock-screen live status.
- What changed: added iOS 26-gated Liquid Glass styling, an Action Button/App Intent flow into Talk Mode, and a Live Activity / Dynamic Island implementation for connection state.
- What did NOT change (scope boundary): no older-iOS behavior is replaced outside availability guards, no gateway protocol changes are introduced, and no non-iOS platform changes are included.
- AI-assisted: yes (AI-assisted implementation, contributor-reviewed).
- Testing level: simulator + physical-device verification.

## Change Type (select all)

- [ ] Bug fix
- [x] Feature
- [ ] Refactor required for the fix
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Security hardening
- [ ] Chore/infra

## Scope (select all touched areas)

- [ ] Gateway / orchestration
- [ ] Skills / tool execution
- [ ] Auth / tokens
- [ ] Memory / storage
- [x] Integrations
- [ ] API / contracts
- [x] UI / DX
- [ ] CI/CD / infra

## Linked Issue/PR

- Closes #
- Related #
- [ ] This PR fixes a bug or regression

## Root Cause (if applicable)

- Root cause: N/A — feature work.
- Missing detection / guardrail: N/A.
- Prior context (`git blame`, prior PR, issue, or refactor if known): N/A.
- Why this regressed now: N/A.
- If unknown, what was ruled out: N/A.

## Regression Test Plan (if applicable)

- Coverage level that should have caught this:
  - [ ] Unit test
  - [ ] Seam / integration test
  - [ ] End-to-end test
  - [x] Existing coverage already sufficient
- Target test or file: N/A.
- Scenario the test should lock in: N/A.
- Why this is the smallest reliable guardrail: N/A — feature work validated by simulator/device behavior.
- Existing test that already covers this (if any): N/A.
- If no new test is added, why not: this PR is primarily platform/UI feature work verified in runtime on simulator/device.

## User-visible / Behavior Changes

- iOS 26 Liquid Glass styling appears on key UI surfaces.
- Users can launch directly into Talk Mode via Action Button / App Intent.
- Dynamic Island and lock-screen Live Activity show connection state.

## Diagram (if applicable)

N/A

## Security Impact (required)

- New permissions/capabilities? (`Yes/No`): Yes
- Secrets/tokens handling changed? (`Yes/No`): No
- New/changed network calls? (`Yes/No`): No
- Command/tool execution surface changed? (`Yes/No`): No
- Data access scope changed? (`Yes/No`): No
- If any `Yes`, explain risk + mitigation: this adds user-facing iOS capabilities (App Intent / Live Activity) but no silent data-scope expansion. Platform features remain subject to iOS availability and user/device control.

## Repro + Verification

### Environment

- OS: iOS 26 device + simulator local dev environment
- Runtime/container: local iOS app build
- Model/provider: N/A
- Integration/channel (if any): iOS app UX
- Relevant config (redacted): local iOS signing/dev config

### Steps

1. Build and install the iOS app from this branch.
2. Trigger Talk Mode via Action Button/App Intent.
3. Observe Liquid Glass surfaces and Dynamic Island / lock-screen Live Activity state transitions.

### Expected

- Glass styling renders only where supported.
- Action Button shortcut launches the app and activates Talk Mode.
- Dynamic Island / Live Activity reflects connection status correctly.

### Actual

- Matched expected during simulator and physical-device verification.

## Evidence

Attach at least one:

- [ ] Failing test/log before + passing after
- [x] Trace/log snippets
- [x] Screenshot/recording
- [ ] Perf numbers (if relevant)

## Human Verification (required)

- Verified scenarios:
  - physical-device build/install succeeds
  - Action Button opens app + activates voice mode
  - Dynamic Island / lock-screen Live Activity render correctly
  - Liquid Glass renders on supported iOS 26 surfaces
  - simulator build passes
- Edge cases checked:
  - availability-gated behavior on supported runtime
  - live activity state updates for connection changes
- What you did **not** verify:
  - full repository CI matrix
  - non-iOS platforms

## Review Conversations

- [x] I replied to or resolved every bot review conversation I addressed in this PR.
- [x] I left unresolved only the conversations that still need reviewer or maintainer judgment.

If a bot review conversation is addressed by this PR, resolve that conversation yourself. Do not leave bot review conversation cleanup for maintainers.

## Compatibility / Migration

- Backward compatible? (`Yes/No`): Yes
- Config/env changes? (`Yes/No`): No
- Migration needed? (`Yes/No`): No
- If yes, exact upgrade steps: N/A



## Risks and Mitigations

- Risk: new iOS 26-only UX can regress older-runtime behavior if availability guards are incomplete.
  - Mitigation: feature code is availability-gated and was verified on supported simulator/device flows.
target.author: eulicesl

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
